objective: A separately authorized immutable pre-activation materialization loads and byte-verifies the immutable M1.3 record, receipt, wallet-use evidence, and all three M1.3 Agentgres projections; compares caller-supplied expected source roots; derives every M1.4 artifact server-side under the distinct scope:autonomous_system.genesis_materialize; durably prepares before wallet consumption; and converges one materialization, portable receipt, component-registry snapshot, and immutable wallet-use proof through four strict no-clobber Agentgres domains.
falsifiable_claim: M1.3 bytes and domain heads never change; proposed initial roots survive only as named trace history and cannot become operational roots; the resulting state is materialized_pending_activation with no activation, membership, lifecycle, network, or runtime effect.
adversarial_or_fault_proof: Independently recomputes six roots; rejects unknown/secret/caller-authored operational fields and stale source roots before authority; refuses same-hash foreign signers; linearizes twelve exact requests to one result; proves exact local/Agentgres reconstruction and source immutability; rejects forged activation; retains an unconsumed intent after authority revocation; converges an already-consumed grant exactly once after restart without re-authoring.
remaining_nonclaims: Active-profile admission, initialization, activation, membership, lifecycle/network/runtime effects, Systems UX, and permanent navigation are absent from this cut.
source_provenance: Migrated 2026-07-22 from the implementation-matrix AutonomousSystem envelope row; the cell's 'implemented in this held cut' claim was stale (merged on master, commit 2259ec736 and hardening chain).
